battleRound.notes: Both players take a turn each battle round. Same player always goes first each round.

command.cpGained: Both players gain 1CP at start of Command phase
command.maxCPPerRound: Maximum 1CP per battle round from any source (total, including Command phase CP)
command.notes: Resolve any other Command phase rules before Battle-shock step

battleShock.trigger: Each unit Below Half-strength on battlefield
battleShock.roll: 2D6 — pass if result >= best Leadership in unit
failEffects: If Falls Back, take Desperate Escape test for every model
Controlling player cannot use Stratagems to affect that unit
battleShock.duration: Until start of next Command phase
battleShock.insaneBravery: Insane Bravery Stratagem (1CP) lets unit auto-pass — once per battle

moveTypes.remainStationary: Unit does not move — models cannot be moved rest of phase
moveTypes.normalMove: Move up to M". Cannot end within Engagement Range of enemy
moveTypes.advance: Roll D6, add to M". Cannot shoot or charge same turn (except Assault weapons)
moveTypes.fallBack: Move up to M" out of Engagement Range. Cannot shoot or charge same turn. Desperate Escape tests for models moving over enemy (1-2 on D6 = one model destroyed)

unitCoherency.2to6models: All within 2" horizontally and 5" vertically of at least one other model in unit
unitCoherency.7plusModels: All within 2" horizontally and 5" vertically of at least two other models

terrain.upTo2inches: Models move over freely as if not there
terrain.over2inches: Must climb — count vertical distance as part of move. Cannot end mid-climb
terrain.flying: FLY models can move over enemy models and terrain. Measure through air when starting/ending on terrain

reinforcements.deepStrike: Set up more than 9" horizontally from all enemy models

strategicReserves.round2: Within 6" of any battlefield edge, not in enemy deployment zone, not within 9" of enemies
strategicReserves.round3plus: Within 6" of any battlefield edge, not within 9" of enemies

reinforcements.reservesUnitRule: Counts as having made Normal move — cannot move further. Any unit not on battlefield at battle end counts as destroyed

transports.embark: All models end Normal/Advance/Fall Back move within 3" of friendly TRANSPORT — can embark
transports.disembark: Set up wholly within 3" of TRANSPORT, not within Engagement Range of enemy
transports.disembarkAfterMove: Counts as Normal move — cannot move or charge this turn
transports.cannotDisembark: If TRANSPORT Advanced or Fell Back this turn
transports.destroyedTransport: Must disembark. Roll D6 per model — on 1, unit suffers 1 mortal wound. Unit Battle-shocked until next Command phase. Counts as Normal move, cannot charge
transports.emergencyDisembark: If cannot set up within 3" — set up within 6" instead. Roll D6 per model — 1-3 = 1 mortal wound

aircraft.movement: Normal move only. Must move straight forward minimum 20". Can pivot up to 90° after. Cannot Advance/Fall Back/Remain Stationary
aircraft.offEdge: If base crosses battlefield edge or cannot make minimum move — placed in Strategic Reserves, arrives next turn
aircraft.deployement: Must start in Reserves, treated as Strategic Reserves once battle starts

rules: Each unit can only make one surge move per phase
Cannot surge while within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units

shootingPhase.eligibility: Unit cannot shoot if it Advanced or Fell Back this turn, or is within Engagement Range of enemy (except Pistols/MONSTERS/VEHICLES)
shootingPhase.selectTargets: Before any attacks resolved. Target must have at least one model visible to attacking model and within weapon range

bigGunsNeverTire.rule: MONSTER and VEHICLE can shoot even while within Engagement Range of enemy
bigGunsNeverTire.penalty: -1 to Hit rolls when making ranged attacks if within Engagement Range (not Pistols)
bigGunsNeverTire.canBeTargeted: Enemy MONSTER/VEHICLE within Engagement Range of your units CAN be targeted — but each attack suffers -1 Hit (not Pistols)

shootingPhase.lockedInCombat: Cannot shoot while within Engagement Range of enemy. Cannot shoot at enemies within Engagement Range of your friendly units (exceptions: MONSTER/VEHICLE, Pistols)

chargePhase.eligibility: Must be within 12" of enemy and not have Advanced or Fell Back. Cannot charge if within Engagement Range. AIRCRAFT cannot charge
chargePhase.chargeRoll: 2D6" — must be sufficient to end within Engagement Range of all targets without entering Engagement Range of non-targets
chargePhase.chargeBonus: Unit that makes Charge move gains Fights First until end of turn
chargePhase.targets: Do not need to be visible. Can select multiple targets

fightPhase.fightsFirst: Units with Fights First ability (including those that charged) fight first — players alternate, starting with player whose turn it is NOT
fightPhase.alternating: Players alternate selecting eligible units. Cannot pass — must fight if eligible units remain
fightPhase.eligible: Within Engagement Range of enemy, OR made Charge move this turn

fightSequence.pileIn: Move each model not in base contact up to 3" — must end closer to closest enemy, in base contact if possible. Unit must end in Engagement Range and Unit Coherency
fightSequence.attacks: Determine which models can fight. Select weapon. Select targets. Make attacks
fightSequence.consolidate: Move each model not in base contact up to 3" toward closest enemy. If cannot stay in Engagement Range — can move toward closest objective marker (must end within range)

fightPhase.whichModelsFight: Models within Engagement Range of enemy, OR in base contact with another model in same unit that is in base contact with enemy

hitRoll.maxModifier: Cannot be modified by more than -1 or +1 total

woundRoll.maxModifier: Cannot be modified by more than -1 or +1 total

attackSequence.allocateAttack: Must allocate to model that has already lost wounds or had attacks allocated this phase. Otherwise, any model in unit

savingThrow.invulnerable: Never modified by AP. Player chooses armour or invulnerable save
savingThrow.maxImprovement: Cannot be improved by more than +1
savingThrow.benefitOfCover: +1 to armour saving throws against ranged attacks. Does not apply to models with 3+ Save against AP 0 attacks

rules: Each mortal wound = 1 damage, allocated one at a time
No saving throws of any kind
Excess damage NOT lost — carry over to next model in unit (unless Hazardous or Devastating Wounds)
Mortal wounds from attacks apply AFTER normal damage, even if normal damage saved

attackSequence.damage: Model loses wounds equal to attack Damage characteristic. If reduced to 0 — destroyed. Excess damage from attack lost

belowHalfStrength.multiModel: Number of models < half Starting Strength

keyRules.startingStrength: Number of models when added to army

attachedUnits.formation: Leader CHARACTER attaches to Bodyguard unit during Declare Battle Formations
attachedUnits.toughness: Always use Bodyguard Toughness when targeted
attachedUnits.attackAllocation: Attacks cannot be allocated to CHARACTER while Bodyguard models remain
attachedUnits.precision: PRECISION attacks against Attached unit can be allocated to visible CHARACTER
attachedUnits.startingStrength: Combined Starting Strengths of Leader + Bodyguard

keyRules.feelNoPain: Roll D6 each time model would lose a wound — if result >= x, wound not lost
keyRules.deadlyDemise: When model destroyed, roll D6 before removing — on 6, each unit within 6" suffers x mortal wounds
keyRules.loneOperative: Can only be targeted by ranged attacks if attacking model within 12"
keyRules.stealth: Each time ranged attack made against unit, subtract 1 from Hit roll
keyRules.auraAbilities: Model always within range of own Aura. Multiple instances of same Aura don't stack
keyRules.persistingEffects: Effects with duration continue even if unit embarks/disembarks or Attached unit separates
keyRules.outOfPhaseRules: When using out-of-phase rules to perform an action, cannot use any other rules triggered normally in that phase
keyRules.sequencing: Two rules at same time — player whose turn it is chooses order. Pre/post-battle or start/end of battle round — roll off

weaponAbilities.ASSAULT: Can be shot even if unit Advanced. When selected to shoot, only Assault weapons can be used
weaponAbilities.RAPID_FIRE_X: Increase Attacks by X when targeting units within half range
weaponAbilities.PISTOL: Can shoot while within Engagement Range of enemy — must target one of those enemy units. Cannot shoot alongside non-Pistol weapons (except MONSTER/VEHICLE)
weaponAbilities.LANCE: Add 1 to Wound roll if bearer made Charge move this turn
weaponAbilities.INDIRECT_FIRE: Can target units not visible. If no models visible when selected — subtract 1 from Hit roll, 1-3 always fails, target has Benefit of Cover
weaponAbilities.PRECISION: When attack successfully wounds Attached unit, can allocate to visible CHARACTER instead
weaponAbilities.BLAST: Add 1 to Attacks for every 5 models in target unit (round down). Cannot target units within Engagement Range of own army
weaponAbilities.MELTA_X: Increase Damage by X when targeting units within half range
weaponAbilities.HEAVY: Add 1 to Hit rolls if unit Remained Stationary this turn
weaponAbilities.HAZARDOUS: After shooting/fighting, roll D6 per Hazardous weapon used — on 1, selected model suffers 3 mortal wounds (wounded model first, then non-CHARACTER, then CHARACTER)
weaponAbilities.DEVASTATING_WOUNDS: Critical Wound — no saves of any kind. Allocate after all other attacks resolved. Inflicts mortal wounds equal to Damage characteristic instead of normal damage
weaponAbilities.SUSTAINED_HITS_X: Critical Hit scores X additional hits
weaponAbilities.EXTRA_ATTACKS: Attack with this weapon in addition to one other melee weapon
weaponAbilities.ANTI_KEYWORD_X: Unmodified Wound roll of X+ against targets with matching keyword = Critical Wound
weaponAbilities.IGNORES_COVER: Target cannot have Benefit of Cover against this attack

deploymentAbilities.DEEP_STRIKE: Set up in Reserves. Arrive in Reinforcements step, more than 9" horizontally from all enemy models. If arriving from Strategic Reserves, can choose Deep Strike OR Strategic Reserves placement
deploymentAbilities.SCOUTS_X: At start of first battle round before first turn, make Normal move up to X". Must end more than 9" from all enemy models. DEDICATED TRANSPORT can use if embarked unit has Scouts
deploymentAbilities.INFILTRATORS: During deployment, can be set up anywhere on battlefield more than 9" from enemy deployment zone and all enemy models
deploymentAbilities.LEADER: CHARACTER with Leader ability can attach to listed Bodyguard units during Declare Battle Formations
deploymentAbilities.FIGHTS_FIRST: Unit eligible to fight does so in Fights First step (every model in unit must have this ability)

rules.oncePerPhase: Cannot use same Stratagem more than once per phase
rules.battleShockedRestriction: Cannot use Stratagems to affect Battle-shocked units
rules.cpCostModification: Rules that let you use Stratagem for 0CP without naming it — instead reduce cost by 1CP. Cannot grant ability to use same Stratagem twice per phase unless Stratagem named explicitly

categories.EPIC_DEED: Individual model or unit performs mighty feat

balanceDataslateChanges.worsenAPStratagems: Effect changed to 'until attacking unit has finished making its attacks' not 'until end of phase'
balanceDataslateChanges.closerSetUpStratagems: Effects allowing set up more than 3" changed to more than 6"
balanceDataslateChanges.preventTargetingStratagems: Effects allowing targeting only within 12" changed to 18"
balanceDataslateChanges.moreThanOncePerPhase: Can only use if Stratagem name explicitly specified in the rule

COMMAND_RE_ROLL.when: Any phase — just after making Advance roll, Charge roll, Desperate Escape test, Hazardous test, Hit roll, Wound roll, Damage roll, saving throw, or roll to determine attacks
COMMAND_RE_ROLL.effect: Re-roll that roll/test/saving throw. If fast dice rolling, select one to re-roll

COUNTER_OFFENSIVE.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has fought
COUNTER_OFFENSIVE.target: One unit from your army within Engagement Range of enemy that has not fought this phase

EPIC_CHALLENGE.when: Fight phase, when a CHARACTER unit from your army within Engagement Range of one or more Attached units is selected to fight
EPIC_CHALLENGE.target: One CHARACTER model in your unit
EPIC_CHALLENGE.effect: Until end of phase, all melee attacks by that model have PRECISION ability

INSANE_BRAVERY.when: Battle-shock step of your Command phase, just before taking a Battle-shock test
INSANE_BRAVERY.effect: Unit automatically passes that Battle-shock test
INSANE_BRAVERY.restriction: Cannot use more than once per battle

GRENADE.target: One GRENADES unit (not Advanced/Fell Back/shot this turn, not within Engagement Range of enemy)
GRENADE.effect: Select one GRENADES model and one enemy unit not within Engagement Range of any of your units and within 8" and visible. Roll six D6: for each 4+, target suffers 1 mortal wound

TANK_SHOCK.when: Your Charge phase, just after a VEHICLE unit ends a Charge move
TANK_SHOCK.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range and one VEHICLE model within Engagement Range of it. Roll D6 equal to Toughness of selected VEHICLE model. For each 5+, enemy suffers 1 mortal wound (max 6)

RAPID_INGRESS.target: One unit from your army in Reserves
RAPID_INGRESS.effect: Unit arrives as if Reinforcements step of your Movement phase. If every model has Deep Strike, can use Deep Strike placement
RAPID_INGRESS.restriction: Cannot enable unit to arrive in battle round it would not normally be able to

FIRE_OVERWATCH.when: Opponent's Movement or Charge phase — just after enemy unit set up, or starts/ends Normal/Advance/Fall Back move, or declares a charge
FIRE_OVERWATCH.target: One unit from your army within 24" of enemy and eligible to shoot if it were your Shooting phase
FIRE_OVERWATCH.effect: If enemy visible to your unit, your unit shoots that enemy as if your Shooting phase
restrictions: Until end of phase, unmodified Hit roll of 6 required to score hit (regardless of BS or modifiers)
FIRE_OVERWATCH.notes: MONSTER/VEHICLE locked in combat cannot use Fire Overwatch. Out-of-phase — other Shooting phase rules do not trigger

GO_TO_GROUND.when: Opponent's Shooting phase, just after enemy unit selects targets
GO_TO_GROUND.target: One INFANTRY unit from your army selected as target of one or more attacks
GO_TO_GROUND.effect: Until end of phase, all models have 6+ invulnerable save and Benefit of Cover

SMOKESCREEN.when: Opponent's Shooting phase, just after enemy unit selects targets
SMOKESCREEN.target: One SMOKE unit from your army selected as target of one or more attacks
SMOKESCREEN.effect: Until end of phase, all models have Benefit of Cover and Stealth ability

HEROIC_INTERVENTION.when: Opponent's Charge phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Charge move
HEROIC_INTERVENTION.target: One unit from your army within 6" of that enemy unit and eligible to declare a charge against it
HEROIC_INTERVENTION.effect: Your unit declares a charge targeting only that enemy unit, resolved as if your Charge phase
restrictions: Can only select VEHICLE unit if it is a WALKER
Even if charge successful, your unit does NOT receive Charge bonus this turn

maximumPoints.notes: Combined points of all units in Strategic Reserves cannot exceed these limits. Units embarked in TRANSPORT in Reserves count too

strategicReserves.arrival: From second battle round onwards during Reinforcements step

placement.round2: Wholly within 6" of any battlefield edge. Not in enemy deployment zone. Not within 9" of any enemy
placement.round3plus: Wholly within 6" of any battlefield edge. Not within 9" of any enemy

strategicReserves.notDeployed: Any Strategic Reserves units not on battlefield at battle end count as destroyed
strategicReserves.aircraft: AIRCRAFT must start in Reserves. Treated as Strategic Reserves once battle starts

benefitOfCover.effect: +1 to armour saving throws against ranged attacks
benefitOfCover.restriction: Models with Save 3+ or better cannot benefit against attacks with AP 0

CRATER.cover: INFANTRY wholly on top has Benefit of Cover against ranged attacks

BARRICADE.movement: Can move up, over, down — cannot end on top
BARRICADE.engagement: In Charge phase, if enemy within 1" of barricade, charging unit on opposite side can charge if ending as close as possible to barricade and within 2". In Fight phase, eligible to fight if target on opposite side within 2"
BARRICADE.cover: INFANTRY wholly within 3" — if not fully visible due to barricade, has Benefit of Cover

BATTLEFIELD_DEBRIS.movement: Can move up, over, down — cannot end on top
BATTLEFIELD_DEBRIS.cover: If model not fully visible to every attacker due to this feature, has Benefit of Cover

HILL.movement: Models can be set up on or end move on top (base must not overhang)
HILL.cover: If model not fully visible to every attacker due to this feature, has Benefit of Cover

WOODS.visibility: Models wholly within are never fully visible. Models outside looking through woods — target never fully visible (has Benefit of Cover). AIRCRAFT and TOWERING exceptions
WOODS.cover: Model wholly within, or not fully visible due to woods = Benefit of Cover

RUINS.movement: INFANTRY/PRIMARCH/BEAST can move through walls/floors as if not there. Cannot end within wall. INFANTRY/FLY can be on any floor level. Others ground floor only
RUINS.visibility: Cannot see over or through (units outside cannot draw LoS through walls). Models can see INTO ruins normally. Models wholly within can see out normally
RUINS.plungingFire: Model wholly within, 6"+ vertically above ground, targets at ground level — improve AP by 1
RUINS.cover: Model wholly within, or not fully visible due to ruins = Benefit of Cover

armyRules.factionKeyword: All units must share the chosen faction keyword
armyRules.enhancements: Max 3 enhancements. Only CHARACTERS can have enhancements. No duplicate enhancements. EPIC HEROES cannot have enhancements
armyRules.unitDuplicates: Max 3 units with same datasheet name. Max 6 if BATTLELINE or DEDICATED TRANSPORT
armyRules.epicHeroes: Cannot include same EPIC HERO more than once
armyRules.warlord: Must include at least one CHARACTER eligible to be Warlord
armyRules.dedicatedTransports: Must start with at least one unit embarked — or cannot be deployed and counts as destroyed in round 1

objectiveMarkers.levelOfControl: Sum of OC characteristics of all models within range
objectiveMarkers.controlled: Player with highest Level of Control at end of any phase or turn
objectiveMarkers.contested: Both players have equal Level of Control
objectiveMarkers.cannotEndOnMarker: Models cannot end a move on top of objective marker

onlyWarMission.captureAndControl: Progressive — from round 2 onwards, at end of each player's Command phase score 1VP per controlled objective (max 3VP per turn)
onlyWarMission.battleEnd: After 5 rounds OR all models in one army destroyed
onlyWarMission.victory: Most VP wins. If one army destroyed — that player loses regardless of VP

visibility.modelVisible: Any part of another model can be seen from any part of observing model
visibility.unitVisible: One or more models in unit visible to observing model
visibility.modelFullyVisible: Every part of another model facing observing model can be seen from any part of observing model
visibility.unitFullyVisible: Every model in unit fully visible to observing model
visibility.notes: Observing model can see through other models in its own unit. For fully visible — can also see through models in unit being observed

dice.D3: Roll D6, halve result rounding up
dice.rerolls: Cannot re-roll a dice more than once. Re-rolls before modifiers. Re-roll all dice if result is sum of multiple dice (e.g. 2D6)
dice.rollOff: Both roll D6 — highest wins. Ties: roll off again. No re-rolls or modifiers allowed

youDo: Take Battle-shock tests for Below Half-strength units

bothPlayersDo: Units with Fights First ability fight (alternating — non-active player starts)
Remaining units fight (alternating — non-active player starts)

keyDefinitions.normalDamage: Damage inflicted by weapon Damage characteristic (not mortal wounds)
keyDefinitions.psychicAttack: Attack with PSYCHIC weapon or mortal wounds from Psychic ability
keyDefinitions.belowHalfStrength: Fewer than half Starting Strength models remaining (or for single-model units: fewer than half Wounds remaining)
keyDefinitions.attachedUnit: Leader CHARACTER merged with Bodyguard unit — treated as single unit
keyDefinitions.reservesUnit: Unit starting battle in location other than battlefield
keyDefinitions.engagementRange: Within 1" horizontally and 5" vertically of enemy model
keyDefinitions.unitCoherency: All models within 2" horizontally and 5" vertically of at least one (or two if 7+ models) other model in same unit
